Planning

How to Estimate IT Project Costs in 2026

Published on May 13, 2026

When it comes to building an IT project, budgeting is often the most challenging aspect. Let's explore how to get an accurate estimate.

1. Define Your Scope

Before you even think about the cost, you must outline what you're building.

2. Choose the Right Platform

The choice between native iOS/Android development and cross-platform tools like React Native or Flutter can change your budget by tens of thousands of dollars.

3. Account for Maintenance

Many businesses forget that launching the app is only 30% of the cost over its lifetime.

Try our calculators to get a quick estimate!
